name: Arugula & Nectarine Salad
recipeIngredient: 5 tablespoons Olive oil or vegetable oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast walnuts for 5 to 8 minutes in a 300°F oven or toaster oven.
2. Combine dressing ingredients; mix together well.
3. Arrange salad ingredients in a bowl.
4. Pour dressing over the salad.
5. Sprinkle with toasted walnuts.
